threads.topic: Understanding Knock PWM at 100%

key_details: Knock PWM at 100% indicates maximum retardation of ignition timing
Excessive engine knocking triggers this full retardation

- Excessive engine knocking triggers this full retardation

threads.topic: Differences in PWM capabilities between different microcontrollers
threads.summary: The thread discusses the limitations of PWM (Pulse Width Modulation) frequency on mega and 328p microcontrollers compared to the ESP32, which offers a much wider range. Specifically, the ESP32 can adjust its PWM frequency based on available timers.
key_details: Mega & 328p have fixed PWM frequencies
ESP32 has an infinite range of PWM frequencies limited by timers
ESP32-C3 supports 4 different timers for PWM
ESP32-S2 supports 8 different timers for PWM
Original ESP32 supports 16 different timers for PWM
ESP32-S3 supports 8+12 different timers for PWM
